name: Rice and Coconut Milk
recipeInstructions:
1. Rinse the chosen rice (long grain white, jasmine, or pearl) until the water runs clear.
2. Place the rinsed rice in a 2-1/2 quart saucepan.
3. Add the desired amount of coconut milk.
4. Add cold water to cover the top surface of the rice by exactly 1 inch.
5. Bring the mixture to a boil, then continue cooking until the top surface of the rice is no longer covered with liquid.
6. Reduce heat to the lowest setting and cover the saucepan. Simmer/steam for 15 minutes.
7. Season with salt and pepper.
8. Garnish with chopped cilantro.
Black and Decker type Steamer
1. Use a full water bath level in the steamer.
2. Place half a cup of washed rice in the bowl.
3. Add one-quarter cup of coconut milk to the bowl.
4. Make up the remaining amount with water (half a cup).
5. Set the timer for 35 minutes.
6. Once done, fluff the rice with a fork and season with salt and pepper.
7. Garnish with chopped cilantro.
